name: workramp
description: Reads and writes WorkRamp users and groups, and reads guides, resources, and SCORM courses, through the real WorkRamp Employee Learning Cloud API (app.workramp.com/api/v1).

risk.read: external WorkRamp API read of user, group, guide, resource, and SCORM-course data
risk.write: external mutation of WorkRamp users and groups (create/update/delete); actions are attributed to the API key's owning admin user; approval required
risk.approval: writes require approval; reads are none
